documentation.description:
Binary files that are opened/created at declaration and closed when finalized
See the child package Text for text I/O
Copyright (C) by PragmAda Software Engineering
Released under the terms of the BSD 3-Clause license; see https://opensource.org/licenses

array_types.name: Byte_List
array_types.code: type Byte_List is array (Positive range <>) of Byte;

tagged_types.name: File_Handle
tagged_types.code: type File_Handle (<>) is tagged limited private;

documentation.description:
Opened/created on creation, closed on finalization
Can be both read and written

subtypes.name: Position_Value
subtypes.code: subtype Position_Value is Count_Value range 1 .. Count_Value'Last;

subprograms.name: Created
subprograms.code: function Created (Name : in String; Form : in String := "") return File_Handle

documentation.description: Creates a new file named Name (deleting any existing file named Name)

subprograms.name: End_Of_File
subprograms.code: function End_Of_File (File : in File_Handle) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Next
subprograms.code: function Next (File : in out File_Handle) return Byte

documentation.description: Returns the byte in File at the current position and increments the current position

subprograms.name: Opened
subprograms.code: function Opened (Name : in String; Form : in String := "") return File_Handle

subprograms.name: Opened_Or_Created
subprograms.code: function Opened_Or_Created (Name : in String; Form : in String := "") return File_Handle

subprograms.name: Position
subprograms.code: function Position (File : in File_Handle) return Position_Value

documentation.description: Returns the current position in File

subprograms.name: Read
subprograms.code: procedure Read (File : in out File_Handle; List : out Byte_List)

documentation.description:
Calls File.Next for every Byte in List
Raises Ada.IO_Exceptions.End_Error if there are fewer than List'Length bytes left in File

subprograms.name: Set_Position
subprograms.code: procedure Set_Position (File : in out File_Handle; Position : in Position_Value)

documentation.description: Sets the current position of File to Position

subprograms.name: Size
subprograms.code: function Size (File : in File_Handle) return Count_Value

documentation.description: Returns the current number of bytes in File

subprograms.name: Write
subprograms.code: procedure Write (File : in out File_Handle; Value : in Byte)

documentation.description: Writes Value to File at the current position and increments the current position

subprograms.name: Write
subprograms.code: procedure Write (File : in out File_Handle; Value : in Byte_List)

documentation.description: Calls File.Write for every Byte in Value
